session.user: Run `ruff check --select E501 src/ packages/ tests/` in the directory /home/runner/work/erk/erk to find all line-too-long errors. Report the exact file paths, line numbers, and the offending lines so I can fix them. Do NOT modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check to find all line-too-long errors and report them.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check --select E501 src/ packages/ tests/

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 E501 Line too long (104 > 100) --> src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_update.py:122:101 | 120 | # Step 3: Update plan content via ManagedPrBackend 121 | try: 122 | backend.update_managed_pr_content(repo_root, pr_id, plan_content.strip(), summary=summary or "") | ^^^^ 123 | except RuntimeError as e: 124 | _handle_update_error(f"Failed to update comment: {e}", cause=e) |

Found 11 errors.

ruff check passed with violations found: 11 line-too-long errors
